ddl_schema:
CREATE TABLE projects (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  project_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL,
  owner TEXT NOT NULL,
  department TEXT NOT NULL,
  budget_usd REAL NOT NULL,
  start_date TEXT NOT NULL,
  priority TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE fsi_progress (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  completion_pct REAL NOT NULL,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  milestone TEXT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects(id)
);

projects.id: Primary key of the IT project
projects.status: Project status: in_progress | completed | on_hold | cancelled

fsi_progress.id: Primary key of an FSI progress snapshot
fsi_progress.milestone: Milestone label at the time of update

few_shot_examples.question: Liệt kê tất cả dự án đang triển khai
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT project_name AS project_name, status AS status, owner AS owner, department AS department, budget_usd AS budget_usd, priority AS priority FROM projects WHERE status = 'in_progress'

few_shot_examples.question: Tiến độ FSI trung bình của từng dự án
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT p.project_name AS project_name, ROUND(AVG(f.completion_pct), 2) AS avg_progress_pct, p.status AS status, p.priority AS priority FROM projects p JOIN fsi_progress f ON p.id = f.project_id GROUP BY p.id, p.project_name, p.status, p.priority ORDER BY avg_progress_pct DESC

few_shot_examples.question: Xu hướng tiến độ FSI theo thời gian của từng dự án
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT p.project_name AS project_name, f.updated_at AS updated_at, f.completion_pct AS completion_pct, f.milestone AS milestone FROM projects p JOIN fsi_progress f ON p.id = f.project_id ORDER BY p.project_name, f.updated_at

few_shot_examples.question: Tiến độ tuần này so với tuần trước
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT p.project_name AS project_name, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN f.updated_at >= date('now', '-7 day') THEN f.completion_pct END), 2) AS this_week_avg_pct, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN f.updated_at >= date('now', '-14 day') AND f.updated_at < date('now', '-7 day') THEN f.completion_pct END), 2) AS last_week_avg_pct, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN f.updated_at >= date('now', '-7 day') THEN f.completion_pct END) - AVG(CASE WHEN f.updated_at >= date('now', '-14 day') AND f.updated_at < date('now', '-7 day') THEN f.completion_pct END), 2) AS delta_pct FROM projects p JOIN fsi_progress f ON p.id = f.project_id GROUP BY p.project_name ORDER BY p.project_name

few_shot_examples.question: Dự án FSI nào có phần trăm hoàn thành thấp nhất
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT p.project_name AS project_name, ROUND(AVG(f.completion_pct), 2) AS avg_progress_pct, p.status AS status FROM projects p JOIN fsi_progress f ON p.id = f.project_id GROUP BY p.id, p.project_name, p.status ORDER BY avg_progress_pct ASC LIMIT 5

few_shot_examples.question: Tỷ trọng các dự án FSI theo trạng thái
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT status AS status, COUNT(*) AS project_count FROM projects GROUP BY status ORDER BY project_count DESC

few_shot_examples.question: Danh sách các dự án chưa hoàn thành
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT project_name AS project_name, status AS status, owner AS owner, department AS department, budget_usd AS budget_usd, priority AS priority FROM projects WHERE status = 'in_progress' ORDER BY project_name ASC
